issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Customer support agent with deps_type and tools
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to default to LangChain or hand-rolled OpenAI function-calling patterns and misses PydanticAI's deps_type + @agent.tool + ctx.deps injection; treatment uses Agent('openai:gpt-4o', deps_type=Deps), @dataclass Deps, async @support_agent.tool with ctx.deps.db, and agent.run(..., deps=Deps(...)) precisely as documented.

scenarios.name: Structured CityInfo output with streaming
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for OpenAI native structured outputs and a regular streaming loop, missing the PydanticAI result_type + run_stream pattern; treatment uses Agent(result_type=CityInfo) with run_sync returning result.data and async with agent.run_stream(...) as stream: + async for chunk in stream.stream() as in the skill.
